mapper.select: select gt.*, gy.typename from goodstable gt, goodstype gy where gt.goodstype_id = gy.id and gt.isAdvertisement = 1 order by gt.id desc limit 5
select gt.*, gy.typename from GOODSTABLE gt, GOODSTYPE gy where gt.goodstype_id = gy.id and gt.gname like concat('%',#{mykey},'%')
select gt.*, gy.typeName from goodstable gt, goodstype gy where gt.goodstype_id = gy.id and gt.id = #{id}
